title: Action Pre-Flight Checks
concept: Running proposed actions against regex or policy rules to block hazardous commands (like 'rm -rf').

exercises.prompt: What is the main purpose of filtering untrusted environment inputs in AI systems?

options.text: To allow all inputs regardless of source
To prevent injection attacks on the agent

exercises.explain: Filtering helps keep AI systems safe from harmful inputs.

cards.title: Pre-Flight Checks in Action
cards.body: Before an AI takes any action, it must perform pre-flight checks to ensure safety and compliance with rules.

cards.title: What are Pre-Flight Checks?
cards.body: These are verifications done by the AI to ensure its intended actions follow safety guidelines and policies.

cards.title: Like an Airplane Pilot
cards.body: Just like pilots check an airplane's systems before takeoff, AI checks its actions before executing them.

cards.title: Example of Pre-Flight Check
cards.body: If an AI wants to delete files, it will check commands against a safety rule to prevent dangerous actions.

cards.title: Myth: AIs Don’t Need Checks
cards.body: Some believe AIs are always safe, but this is false; checks are essential for preventing mistakes.

cards.title: Action Checks Comparison
cards.body: Actions must be checked to prevent harm. Here’s how checks work:

exercises.prompt: What is the role of regex in action pre-flight checks?
exercises.explain: Regex helps identify and block dangerous commands like 'rm -rf' before they're executed.

exercises.prompt: True or False: AIs should perform pre-flight checks to verify actions before executing them.
exercises.explain: Pre-flight checks are crucial to ensure the safety of the actions performed by AI.

exercises.prompt: An AI uses ______ to ensure its actions follow safety guidelines.
exercises.sentence: An AI uses regex to ensure its actions follow safety guidelines.
exercises.explain: Regex allows the AI to properly check its commands.

exercises.prompt: Which of these scenarios illustrates an effective pre-flight check?

options.text: An AI immediately deletes files without checking
An AI checks commands against safety rules before executing
An AI makes changes without any checks

exercises.explain: Effective pre-flight checks ensure the AI's actions are safe before taking them.

exercises.prompt: Why are action pre-flight checks important for AI?

options.text: They help ensure actions are safe and compliant with policies
They speed up the execution of tasks
They allow any action without verification

exercises.explain: Pre-flight checks are vital for safety, helping to prevent unwanted or harmful actions.
